violations.text: The two door fridge (ambient 73F) in the cold production side and dishwasher (stuck in fill mode) in the dish washing area were observed in poor repair. Nothing observed in 2 door fridge and establishment will use 3 bay sink to wash/sanitize. PIC has work orders in for units. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
Inspector observed leak under 3 bay sink (sanitizing bay). New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

The floors in the breakroom and cambro storage areas were observed with droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The ceiling tiles in the breakroom/storage area and women's bathroom area is in poor repair (previous water damage and missing tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The hand-washing sink in the men's room was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can openers, bird bath, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized can openers and bird bath, took ice machine out of service to be washed/sanitized, and disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The ceiling tiles in the backpack and breakroom storage areas are in poor repair (previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The floors in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue, old droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (receiving area) the gate and door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings) throughout the facility ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The following physical facilities observed in poor repair: 1.coving detaching and/or damage from wall in kitchen 2.hole in wall in employee break room 3.ceilings in electrical room damaged and/or missing 4.door of electrical room damaged weather strip. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items, and/or clutter were observed in the (electrical room ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit was taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in the dry food storage and employee breakroom/back storage area ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The (walls ) in the (employee breakroom ) area is in poor repair.Observed holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixing bowl and can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed at 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -can opener base, -prep table under deli slicer, -deli slicer bag. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The outside dumpsters are not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of debris around refuse area. Area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The vents above the dish machine have accumulation of soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The ceiling tiles in the employee break/storage area is in poor repair (observed ceiling tiles with previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

The floor and wall junctures outside the walk-in freezer do not have coving (areas missing). The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The flooring to the threshold (walk-in freezer) is in poor repair. Inspector observed missing tiles and exposed concrete. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
Plastic cup were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Utensil was observed being stored in between the wall and knife holder. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

Slicer located in the Kitchen area was not in good repair. Inspector observed a piece of the food grip broken off. PIC stated the slicer is not used. Equipment to be repaired or removed from establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

Inspector observed walk-in cooler fan unit to be dripping water onto steak and cheese trays. have a dripping fan unit dripping onto steak and cheese trays. PIC disposed of products. PIC called for service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

Inspector observed turkey bacon to be thawing in sink with no running water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC COS. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen (walk-in, equipment shelving) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

The following areas has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris... - Freezer fan - Freezer floor The physical facilities shall be cleaned often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023
Inspector observed walk-in cooler to be in poor repair and dripping water. PIC put in service ticket. All product moved from area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023

The ceilings in the kitchen area and walk in cooler is in poor repair(observed leakage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Food product protected. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (cutting boards, whisk, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

Deli meats and dairy products was observed held at (46-50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product relocated to walk in freezer and 2 dr refrigerator Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the bakers racks have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The walk in cooler in the back kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
Several ceiling tiles in the backpack room and storage room were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
Several lights under hoods were observed burnt out or missing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
Fanguards in the walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer were observed with an accumulation of dust and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
